calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Bob Balian, CSR #5220.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for Citibank South Dakota, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Ayman R. Hussein.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on September 2, 2009.
Declaration of Rhonda Hedges in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial (CCP Section 98) was filed today, December 14, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 14, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank South Dakota, N.A., and against defendant Ayman R. Hussein as follows:

Principal - $13,855.61.
Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $509.75.

Total - $14,365.36.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Responses To Interrogatories
